ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the individual (Male/Female) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the individual */,
  "family_number" INTEGER /* Family number indicating family unit */,
  "urban_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the urban area classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_factors" (
  "risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health factor entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual associated with the risk factors */,
  "careful_factor" REAL /* Factor indicating level of caution taken by the individual */,
  "social_distance_factor" REAL /* Factor indicating adherence to social distancing protocols */,
  "death_risk_factor" REAL /* Calculated death risk factor based on individual profile */,
  "vaccination_status" INTEGER /* Vaccination status of the individual */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, EHR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_factors_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual reporting the symptoms */,
  "symptomatic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual is symptomatic */,
  "severe_illness" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual is experiencing severe illness */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, EHR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptoms_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual associated with the test result */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., lab report, EHR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_areas" (
  "urban_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the urban area */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the urban area (e.g., A, B, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("urban_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health statistic entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher responsible for the statistic */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group classification (e.g., 0-18, 19-35, etc.) */,
  "average_death_risk" REAL /* Average death risk for the group */,
  "percentage_symptomatic" REAL /* Percentage of the group that is symptomatic */,
  "percentage_severe" REAL /* Percentage of the group that is experiencing severe illness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES individuals ("age"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., epidemiologist, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual participating in the intervention */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_participants_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_participants_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcome_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome measure */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention related to the measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure (e.g., reduction in symptomatic cases) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measure recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcome_measures_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths reported */,
  "total_interventions" INTEGER /* Total number of interventions conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view data, modify data) */,
  "is_allowed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
